cases.prompt: Parcels located in Sedro-Woolley city or its immediate unincorporated vicinity with existing residential dwellings classified as low quality, and parcel size between 1 and 3 acres.
action_plan: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.next_action: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.generated_sql:
WITH sedro_woolley_parcels AS (
  SELECT ps.parcel_number, ps.acres, ps.city_name, ps.situs_city_state_zip
  FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search.parquet') ps
  WHERE (lower(ps.city_name) = 'sedro-woolley' OR lower(ps.situs_city_state_zip) LIKE '%sedro-woolley%')
    AND ps.acres BETWEEN 1 AND 3
), low_quality_improvements AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT TRIM(i.ParcelNumber) AS parcel_number, 'MSL low-quality improvement class' AS match_reasons
  FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/improvements.parquet') i
  WHERE TRIM(i.imprv_det_class_cd) = 'MSL'
)
SELECT swp.parcel_number, swp.acres, lqi.match_reasons
FROM sedro_woolley_parcels swp
JOIN low_quality_improvements lqi ON swp.parcel_number = lqi.parcel_number
cases.title: Sedro-Woolley Area Low Quality Residential Dwellings on 1-3 Acre Parcels
cases.criteria_summary: Parcels in Sedro-Woolley city or immediate unincorporated vicinity with existing residential dwellings classified as low quality (improvement class code 'MSL') and parcel size between 1 and 3 acres

cases.prompt: lots in sedro-woolley or marblemount that are over 1 acre with utilities and no improvements.
action_plan: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.next_action: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT ps.parcel_number AS parcel_number, ps.acres, TRIM(a."Utilities") AS utilities
FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search.parquet') ps
JOIN read_parquet('r2://openskagit/assessor.parquet') a ON ps.parcel_number = TRIM(a."Parcel Number")
WHERE ps.acres > 1
  AND (LOWER(ps.city_name) = 'sedro-woolley' OR LOWER(ps.city_name) = 'marblemount' OR LOWER(ps.situs_city_state_zip) LIKE '%sedro-woolley%' OR LOWER(ps.situs_city_state_zip) LIKE '%marblemount%')
  AND TRIM(COALESCE(a."Utilities", '')) <> ''
  AND COALESCE(ps.improvement_building_count, 0) = 0
cases.title: Lots in Sedro-Woolley or Marblemount Over 1 Acre with Utilities and No Improvements
cases.criteria_summary: Parcels located in Sedro-Woolley or Marblemount with acreage greater than 1, having utilities present, and no improvements recorded.

cases.prompt: Recreation lots in sedro-woolley
action_plan: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.next_action: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT ps.parcel_number
FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search.parquet') AS ps
WHERE (lower(ps.city_name) = 'sedro-woolley' OR lower(ps.situs_city_state_zip) LIKE '%sedro-woolley%')
  AND ps.acres > 0
  AND ps.has_geometry = TRUE
  AND ps.land_use IS NOT NULL
  AND (regexp_extract(ps.land_use, '^\((\d+)\)', 1) IN ('910', '911', '920', '930', '940', '941'))
  AND (ps.improvement_building_count IS NULL OR ps.improvement_building_count = 0)
  AND ps.land_use NOT LIKE '%MH leased property%'
  AND ps.land_use NOT LIKE '%condominium%'
  AND ps.land_use NOT LIKE '%public%'
  AND ps.land_use NOT LIKE '%civic%'
  AND ps.land_use NOT LIKE '%open space%'
  AND ps.land_use NOT LIKE '%residential%'
cases.title: Recreation Lots in Sedro-Woolley
